free_text: Study of the giant resonance by photon scattering  in
NaI(Tl)  crystal  of 22 cm diameter and 16 cm
height with energy resolution of 9 %  for  15.1  MeV
Cross sections were deduced from experimental spectra
by  the  special  analytical  method  of Penfold and
Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
